# Test scripttest's own coverage collection across binaries
# This test demonstrates coverage working when scripttest calls coverage-enabled tools

# First use mcpdiff to compare files
exec mcpdiff file1.mcp file2.mcp
stdout 'Files match exactly!'

# Use mcpcat to display content
exec mcpcat -color=never file1.mcp
stderr 'mcp-send'

# Use mcpspy to spy on communication
exec bash -c 'echo "test" | mcpspy'
stdout 'test'

-- file1.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"test","id":1}

-- file2.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"test","id":1}
